testcase.name: test_license_has_effective_start_date
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_62_p0_features.py:213: in test_license_has_effective_start_date if lic.get("effective_start_date"): ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_master_admin_trades_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_62_p0_features.py:268: in test_master_admin_trades_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get master admin trades: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get master admin trades: {"detail":"This endpoint is for licensees only"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
